taxonomy: Triphylloides rubens is classified as a species of lichen, specifically in the genus Triphylloides. It belongs to the family Teloschistaceae, which is a group of crustose lichens. The species is further classified as a type of lichenized fungus, with a symbiotic relationship between fungal and algal components. In terms of its taxonomic hierarchy, it is classified as Kingdom Fungi, Phylum Ascomycota, Class Lecanoromycetes, and Order Teloschistales. This classification reflects the unique characteristics and relationships within the species.
